title: Open the app and navigate to the Book of Mormon, chapter 7
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the Book of Mormon section | Select chapter 7
expected_result: The screen should display the text of chapter 7 from the Book of Mormon

title: Search for a specific verse in chapter 7
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the Book of Mormon section | Select chapter 7 | Click on the search icon in the header | Enter the verse number in the search bar | Press enter or click the search button
expected_result: The screen should display the selected verse from chapter 7

title: Verify that the advertisement is displayed at the bottom
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the Book of Mormon section | Select chapter 7 | Verify that the advertisement for 'The Book of Mormon' is displayed at the bottom
expected_result: The advertisement for 'The Book of Mormon' should be displayed at the bottom of the screen

title: Check if the menu icon in the header navigates to the correct menu
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the Book of Mormon section | Select chapter 7 | Click on the menu icon in the header | Verify that the menu navigates to the correct settings or options
expected_result: The menu should navigate to the correct settings or options

title: Verify that the search icon in the header functions correctly
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the Book of Mormon section | Select chapter 7 | Click on the search icon in the header | Enter a search query | Press enter or click the search button
expected_result: The search results should be displayed correctly

title: Check if the text of the biblical passage is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the Book of Mormon section | Select chapter 7 | Verify that the text of the biblical passage is displayed correctly
expected_result: The text of the biblical passage should be displayed correctly

title: Verify that the advertisement is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app | Navigate to the Book of Mormon section | Select chapter 7 | Verify that the advertisement for 'The Book of Mormon' is displayed correctly
expected_result: The advertisement for 'The Book of Mormon' should be displayed correctly

title: Check if the status bar icons are displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app | Verify that the status bar icons are displayed correctly
expected_result: The status bar icons should be displayed correctly
